creator: screenblack@gmail.com
text:
Hi!

Using KERNPPP you are using the linux version. That version was modified to support something on Debian. Maybe it will be problem.
But, the FreeBSD version was fixed. :)

Thread: http://sourceforge.net/p/poptop/mailman/poptop-server/?viewmonth=201408

Patch: http://sourceforge.net/p/poptop/git/ci/7ac03f8e907dc8ca1077c7fc1c9ceb61dbd2da92/
